acceptance.proof: Two private serialized pinned-official repeats on one caller-explicit active IPv4 host interface bind exact 239.255.172.215:16571 query reception, one independently authored bounded response, finite termination, and cleanup into sanitized hashes.
The fixture and damaged cases preserve observation-only scope, private interface/raw-record exclusion, single-platform limitations, and byte-unchanged production source.
Standard, public-boundary, documentation/instruction, and workflow routes pass without runtime, activation, device, or authority widening.

commit_policy: Commit lifecycle separately; keep all official binaries, wrappers, private driver, interface and endpoint data, raw records, diagnostics, environment, and machine identity outside the public repository.

non_scope: Production runtime or API changes, activation changes, interface enumeration or default selection, ambient fallback, other groups or ports, IPv6, multiple responses, portable retry inference, cross-host or cross-platform claims, devices, dependencies, unsafe/FFI, copied source, commands, routing, admission, or Manifold authority.
objective: Observe only a pinned official resolver on one caller-explicit active IPv4 host interface at exact 239.255.172.215:16571: receive its bounded multicast query, return one independently authored bounded response, observe finite completion and cleanup, and publish only sanitized hash-bound evidence.
outputs: Two serialized private pinned-official active-interface query/response repeats with every attempt retained privately.
One sanitized exact-group fixture binding versions, public source baseline, private artifact hashes, finite outcomes, cleanup, limitations, and nonclaims.
